outer_loop: one pass per asset, file, finding, record, or queue item
inner_loop: refine the current item only while measurable improvement continues
eligibility: finite queue or measurable refinement objective
new evidence or state possible per pass
bounded iterations, cost, time, tokens, and tools
verification_rule: A target score never substitutes for independent verification, and verification never substitutes for an unmet declared threshold.
queue_rule: Each queue item receives its own artifact identity, acceptance record, and residual state.
